description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a combination of white and gray surfaces, accented by wooden slats and glass railings on the upper balcony. The entryway is recessed, with a small porch area, steps, and potted plants, flanked by a low boundary wall and a metal gate. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light to the interior, while the side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer openings. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and a small lawn area. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing simplicity, functionality, and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, glass balcony, and a minimalist white facade accented by wood and metal details. The front features a recessed entryway, potted plants, and a low boundary wall with a gate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony with glass railing, potted plants, and the boundary wall with a gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, minimal windows, and the extension of the balcony and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with minimal openings and a focus on the flat roof and boundary walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side garden, and the continuation of the minimalist design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small porch, steps, potted plants, and a metal gate integrated into a low boundary wall
